messages.author: Baraz
messages.text: Welcome to Malaysia Regional Mashcore Group. I'm from Marudi, Sarawak, Malaysia. Building a repeater for my small town. For the time being please use Australia (Narrow) preset. Looking forward to gather more user from Malaysia so we can share infos with each other. Thank you. (edited)
messages.content_html: Welcome to Malaysia Regional Mashcore Group. I'm from Marudi, Sarawak, Malaysia. Building a repeater for my small town. For the time being please use Australia (Narrow) preset. Looking forward to gather more user from Malaysia so we can share infos with each other. Thank you. (edited)

messages.author: Dan - WI7FI [PNW]
messages.content_html: hell yeah, good luck!
messages.reactions_html: 1

messages.author: Baraz
messages.text: Repeaters List. 1. MY-13-MUR-R1 To standardize repeaters naming, Country and State will be using ISO 3166. District/City/Town can be agreed by local community (in my case I'm using our Aviation Code). R for Repeater. *Country: MY (Malaysia) *State: 13 (Sarawak) *District/City/Town: MUR (Marudi) *Repeater: R1 (Repeater No.1) Thank you. (edited)
messages.content_html: Repeaters List. 1. MY-13-MUR-R1 To standardize repeaters naming, Country and State will be using ISO 3166. messages.author: Uncle Lit
messages.text: the meshcore dev team have moved to a new discord server. details and reasons are here: https://blog.meshcore.io/2026/04/23/the-split Please create a new thread for your region in the https://discord.com/channels/1495203904898728149/1495412453150818585 for your region on the new meshcore.io discord server. https://meshcore.gg
